{{Infobox character
| name = Jyrid
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Jyrid]] is also known as [[Clockworker]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40">''The Engineer'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Jyrid]] is a reliable old human man.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Jyrid]] is described as someone who only cares about protecting people down to his core.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Jyrid?” she asked the old man whom most called Clockworker.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
